name: weather-aggregator
description: Aggregates weather from multiple APIs, averages them, and displays a headline plus per-provider summaries.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w shared && concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
